title: Seul dans la nuit
writer: Yves Boisyvon, Jacqueline Boisyvon, Christian Stengel
actors: Bernard Blier, Sophie Desmarets, Jacques Pills
plot: A series of crimes is being perpetrated around a famous singer. Strangely, during each of the crimes, the artist's voice is heard humming his favorite song. Suspicions lead to a chase through a nocturnal Paris, ending in a disused...
